title: rubus senticosus var. pseudoradula
intro: Rubus senticosus var. pseudoradula, also known as the "sawtooth blackberry", is a variety of the blackberry plant that is native to East Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing pain and inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting immune function. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of Rubus senticosus var. pseudoradula are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
